requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence: 1These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
requirements.object: immediate effect

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Urban Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'UCBs' and individually as 'a UCB') operating in India.
requirements.object: Co-operative Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'UCBs' and individually as 'a UCB') operating in India

requirements.full_sentence:
In this context, Urban Co-operative Banks shall mean Primary Co-operative
Banks as defined under Section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking
Regulation Act, 1949.
requirements.object: as defined under Section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking Regulation Act, 1949

requirements.full_sentence:
In these directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Debtor company' means any company to which a UCB currently has or
previously had a loan or investment exposure (excluding equity instruments)
anytime during the preceding twelve months;
requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'Debtor company' means any company to which a UCB currently has or previously had a loan or investment e

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'Equity instrument' means equity shares, compulsorily convertible
preference shares (CCPS) and compulsorily convertible debentures (CCD);
requirements.object: preference shares (CCPS) and compulsorily convertible debentures (CCD)

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'Financial Services Company' means a company engaged in the 'business
of financial services';
requirements.object: the 'business of financial services'

requirements.full_sentence: Explanation: The 'business of financial services' shall include -

The Board of a UCB desirous of undertaking insurance business as corporate
agent without risk participation shall pass a resolution approving the proposal to
that effect.
requirements.object: the proposal to that effect

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall approve proposal, if any, for entering into contracts
(including for longer-terms) with insurance companies for undertaking insurance
business on a referral basis (without risk participation and with sharing of
physical space).

Further, Board of a UCB desirous of undertaking mutual fund
business shall pass a resolution to that effect.
requirements.object: that effect

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of a UCB desirous of applying for AD Category-I/II license shall
approve and pass a resolution to that effect.
requirements.object: resolution to that effect

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of a UCB desirous of providing online trading facility to its demat
account holders shall pass a resolution confirming that the UCB shall not offer
investment tips or recommendations to customers, nor undertake portfolio
management services, while providing online trading facilities to demat account
holders.
requirements.object: recommendations to customers, nor undertake portfolio management services, while providing online trading facilities to demat

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall approve a comprehensive policy covering merchant acquisition
and customer grievance redressal mechanism for deployment of third-party
point-of-sale terminals.
requirements.object: covering merchant acquisition and customer grievance redressal mechanism for deployment of third-party point-of-sale te

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall frame and approve a detailed policy on customer grievance
redressal mechanism, including an escalation matrix for resolution of
complaints, prior to undertaking issuance of Pre-paid Payment Instruments.
requirements.object: detailed policy on customer grievance redressal mechanism, including an escalation matrix for resolution of complaints, prior to u

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB's investment policy shall have suitable provisions governing its
investments in an AIF Scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations.
requirements.object: its investments in an AIF Scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall not individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of an
AIF Scheme.
requirements.object: 10 percent of the corpus of an AIF Scheme

requirements.full_sentence:
The aggregate contribution by all Regulated Entities (REs) in any AIF Scheme
shall not be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme.
requirements.object: percent of the corpus of that scheme

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
In this context, 'RE' shall mean:
(1) Commercial Banks (including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks);
requirements.object: (including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks)

conditions:
IF Scheme
that has downstream investment (excluding equity instruments) in a debtor
company of the UCB
requirements.full_sentence:
Where a UCB contributes more than five percent of the corpus of an AIF Scheme
that has downstream investment (excluding equity instruments) in a debtor
company of the UCB, the UCB shall be required to make 100 percent provision
to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the
AIF Scheme, subject to a cap equivalent to UCB's direct loan and / or investment
exposure to the said debtor company.
requirements.object: 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the AIF Scheme

conditions:
where a UCB's contribution is
in the form of subordinated units
requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding the provisions of paragraph 14, where a UCB's contribution is
in the form of subordinated units, it shall deduct the entire investment from its
capital funds ‒ proportionately from both Tier-1 and Tier-2 capital (wherever
applicable).
requirements.object: from its capital funds ‒ proportionately from both Tier-1 and Tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)

conditions: IF contained in Part B of Chapter II
requirements.full_sentence:
2The RBI may, in consultation with the Government of India, by way of a
notification, exempt certain AIFs (Annex I) from the scope of these Directions on
AIF contained in Part B of Chapter II, except for paragraph 11.
requirements.object: the Government of India, by way of a notification, exempt certain AIFs (Annex I) from the scope of these Directions on AIF contained in Part B of Chapter II

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall be permitted to enter into agreements with Mutual Funds (MFs) for
marketing their units subject to the following terms and conditions:
(1) A UCB shall act as an agent of the customers and shall be responsible
for forwarding the investors' application for purchase / sale of MF units to
the Mutual Fund / the Registrar / the transfer agents.
requirements.object: into agreements with Mutual Funds (MFs) for marketing their units subject to the following terms and conditions: (1) A UCB shall

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The purchase of MF units shall be at the customers' risk and the UCB
shall not guarantee any assured return on such investments.
requirements.object: on such investments

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) A UCB shall neither acquire such units of Mutual Fund from the
secondary market nor shall it buy back units of Mutual Funds from its
customers.
requirements.object: of Mutual Fund from the secondary market nor shall it buy back units of Mutual Funds from its customers

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) A UCB holding custody of MF units on behalf of their customers shall
ensure that its own investment, where permitted, are kept distinct from
the investments belonging to its customers.
requirements.object: investment

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The distribution of Mutual Fund units shall be restricted to branches of
the UCB.
requirements.object: of the UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) A UCB shall comply with the extant KYC / AML guidelines in respect of
the applicants.
requirements.object: KYC / AML guidelines in respect of the applicants

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall report the details of the tie-up together with a copy of the agreement
entered into with the Mutual Fund, to the concerned office of Department of
Supervision, RBI within a period of ten days from the date of entering into the
arrangement.
requirements.object: the tie-up together with a copy of the agreement entered into with the Mutual Fund, to the concerned office of Department of Sup

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall disclose to its customers details of all types of commissions / fees
(in any form) received from the various mutual fund companies for marketing /
referring their products to them.
requirements.object: details of all types of commissions / fees (in any form) received from the various mutual fund companies for marketing / ref

requirements.full_sentence:
Eligibility Conditions: A UCB shall be permitted to undertake insurance business
as corporate agent without risk participation subject to the following conditions:
(1) A UCB shall not have violated individual and group exposure norms
prescribed by RBI;
requirements.object: group exposure norms prescribed by RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(2) A UCB shall have complied with RBI instructions on loans and advances
to directors, their relatives, and associated firms;
requirements.object: instructions on loans and advances to directors, their relatives, and associated firms

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall not adopt any restrictive practice of compelling its customers to opt
for a particular insurance company in respect of products marketed by it.
requirements.object: of compelling its customers to opt for a particular insurance company in respect of products marketed by it

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB
shall disclose to its customers details of all types of commissions/fees (in any
form) received from the insurance company for marketing their products to them.
requirements.object: details of all types of commissions/fees (in any form) received from the insurance company for marketing their products to t

requirements.full_sentence:
Under the referral arrangement, a UCB shall provide physical infrastructure
within its branch premises to insurance companies for selling their insurance
products to the UCB's customers with adequate disclosure and transparency,
and in turn earn referral fees on the basis of premia collected.
requirements.object: its branch premises to insurance companies for selling their insurance products to the UCB's customers with ade

requirements.full_sentence:
The above
permission shall be subject to the following conditions:
(1) A UCB shall comply with the relevant IRDAI regulations for undertaking
referral business with insurance companies;
requirements.object: following conditions: (1) A UCB shall comply with the relevant IRDAI regulations for undertaking referral business with insurance co

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A UCB shall not adopt any restrictive practice of compelling its customers
to opt for a particular insurance company, particularly in respect of assets
financed by the UCB.
requirements.object: of compelling its customers to opt for a particular insurance company, particularly in respect of assets financed by th

requirements.full_sentence:
The customers shall be allowed to exercise their
own choice of insurer;
requirements.object: their own choice of insurer

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) A UCB desirous of entering into referral arrangement, in addition to
complying with IRDAI regulations, shall also enter into an agreement with
the concerned insurance company for allowing use of its premises and
making use of the existing infrastructure of the UCB;
requirements.object: agreement with the concerned insurance company for allowing use of its premises and making use of the existing infrastructure of th

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The initial agreement shall be for a maximum period of three years at the
first instance and the UCB shall have the discretion to renegotiate the
terms or replace it by another agreement after the initial period,
depending on its satisfaction with the service;
requirements.object: period of three years at the first instance and the UCB shall have the discretion to renegotiate the terms or replace it by another a

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(5) Upon completion of the initial period, a UCB shall be free to sign a longer-
term contract with the approval of its Board;
requirements.object: a longer- term contract with the approval of its Board

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) Participation by a customer in insurance products shall be purely on a
voluntary basis and the same shall be stated in a prominent way in all
publicity material distributed by the UCB.
requirements.object: voluntary basis and the same shall be stated in a prominent way in all publicity material distributed by the UCB
indirect linkage between the provision of banking services offered by the UCB to its customers and use of the insurance products

requirements.full_sentence:
and
(7) The risk, if any, involved in referral arrangement shall not be transferred
to the business of the UCB.
requirements.object: business of the UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall not require prior approval from the RBI to undertake referral
business.
requirements.object: the RBI to undertake referral business

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to ensure transparency and protect the interest of customers, a UCB
shall mandatorily disclose to customers the details of all commissions, fees, or
any other form of remuneration received, if any, from the respective insurance
companies whose products are being referred to.
requirements.object: the details of all commissions, fees, or any other form of remuneration received

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall be eligible to apply for a license as Authorized Dealers (AD)
Category I / II subject to compliance with the following norms:
(1) AD Category-I
requirements.object: for a license as Authorized Dealers (AD) Category I / II subject to compliance with the following norms: (1) AD Category-I

requirements.full_sentence: (i) A UCB shall be included in the Second Schedule to RBI Act 1934;
requirements.object: Second Schedule to RBI Act 1934

requirements.full_sentence: (ii) A UCB shall have a minimum net worth of ₹200 crore;
requirements.object: worth of ₹200 crore

requirements.full_sentence: (iii) The CRAR shall not be less than 12 percent;
requirements.object: percent

requirements.full_sentence: (iv) The gross NPA shall not exceed 10 percent;
(v) A UCB shall have made profit in the preceding three years;
requirements.object: the preceding three years

requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) A UCB shall have no defaults in maintenance of CRR / SLR
requirements;
requirements.object: maintenance of CRR / SLR requirements

requirements.full_sentence: (vii) A UCB shall have sound internal control systems;
requirements.object: systems

requirements.full_sentence:
(viii) A UCB shall have an elected board of management with at least
two professionals.
requirements.object: of management with at least two professionals

requirements.full_sentence: (i) A UCB shall have a minimum net worth of ₹10 crore;
requirements.object: worth of ₹10 crore

requirements.full_sentence: (ii) The CRAR shall not be less than nine percent;
requirements.object: percent

requirements.full_sentence: (iii) The gross NPAs shall not exceed 10 percent;
(iv) A UCB shall have made profit in the preceding three years;
requirements.object: the preceding three years

requirements.full_sentence:
(v) A UCB shall have no defaults in maintenance of CRR / SLR
requirements;
requirements.object: maintenance of CRR / SLR requirements

requirements.full_sentence: (vi) A UCB shall have sound internal control systems;
requirements.object: systems

requirements.full_sentence:
(vii) A UCB shall have an elected board of management with at least
two professional directors.
requirements.object: of management with at least two professional directors

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB fulfilling the above-mentioned eligibility criterion and willing to apply for
AD authorisation shall submit its application through Pravaah Portal
(https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to Department of Regulation, RBI with the document
/ information as specified under:
(1) A copy of the latest audited balance sheet;
requirements.object: Pravaah Portal (https://pravaah

requirements.full_sentence: Fresh authorizations for UCBs to function as FFMC shall not be granted.

A Scheduled UCB, shall be eligible to provide online trading facility to its demat
account holders by entering into a tie-up with a broking entity with prior approval
of the RBI, subject to fulfilling the following criteria:
<image>
(1) The assessed net worth of the UCB shall not be less than ₹500 crore as
per last inspection report;
requirements.object: crore as per last inspection report

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A UCB shall be Financially Sound and Well Managed, as per criteria
prescribed in our Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks -
Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025,
(3) A UCB shall be registered with SEBI as Depository Participant;
requirements.object: Well Managed, as per criteria prescribed in our Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Branch Authorisation) Direc

requirements.full_sentence:
and
(4) A UCB shall have fully implemented Core Banking Solutions (CBS) and
shall be offering Internet Banking services to its customers.
requirements.object: Banking Solutions (CBS) and shall be offering Internet Banking services to its customers

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB fulfilling the criteria prescribed in paragraph 31 above and desirous of
providing online trading facility to its demat account holders shall submit its
application through PRAVAAH Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to Department
of Regulation, RBI with a copy of Board Resolution to the effect that they shall
not be offering tips / recommendations to their customers for on-line trading and
shall also not be undertaking portfolio management services.
requirements.object: PRAVAAH Portal (https://pravaah

requirements.full_sentence:
A Scheduled UCB classified as Financially Sound and Well Managed in terms
of the criteria given in our Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks -
Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025, shall be eligible to undertake the activity
of providing Point of Presence (PoP) Services for National Pension System
(NPS) regulated by Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority
(PFRDA) subject to the following conditions:
(1) A UCB shall have a minimum net worth of ₹100 crore as per immediate
preceding inspection report of the RBI;
requirements.object: the activity of providing Point of Presence (PoP) Services for National Pension System (NPS) regulated by Pension Fund Regula

requirements.full_sentence: (2) A UCB shall have fully implemented Core Banking Solutions (CBS);
requirements.object: Banking Solutions (CBS)
/ letter of warning / displeasure / cautionary advice) imposed on them during the last five years by the RBI / Registrar o

requirements.full_sentence:
and
(4) A UCB shall have at least 25 branches spread across a minimum of 25
districts in three or more states with IT infrastructure and electronically
linked to Central Record keeping Agency (CRA).
requirements.object: branches spread across a minimum of 25 districts in three or more states with IT infrastructure and electronically linked to Central

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB fulfilling the criteria prescribed in paragraph 33 above and desirous of
undertaking activity of providing PoP Services shall submit its application
through PRAVAAH Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to Department of
Regulation, RBI.
requirements.object: PRAVAAH Portal (https://pravaah

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB acting as 'PoP' shall exercise due care in the discharge of its functions
as any act of commission (like misappropriation of subscription received) or
omission (to remit in time the subscriptions received) on the part of the UCB
acting as agent and failure to comply with the provisions of the Pension Fund
Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA) Act, 2013 may entail imposition
of penalty by PFRDA.
requirements.object: the discharge of its functions as any act of commission (like misappropriation of subscription received) or omission (to remit in

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB acting as PoP shall ensure adherence to all the
instructions issued by PFRDA from time to time.
requirements.object: the instructions issued by PFRDA from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB intending to act as POS acquiring bank shall be permitted to deploy its
own POS terminals with prior approval of RBI subject to fulfilling the following
criteria:
(1) A UCB shall comply with criteria mentioned in clauses (i) to (vii) of
paragraph 36 above;
requirements.object: its own POS terminals with prior approval of RBI subject to fulfilling the following criteria: (1) A UCB shall comply with crit
an IS Audit not earlier than six months from the date of application, certifying that the systems are adequately secure

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The assessed net-worth of the UCB shall be more than ₹25 crore as per
the last RBI inspection;
requirements.object: crore as per the last RBI inspection

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The Gross NPA of the UCB shall be less than seven percent and net
NPAs shall be less than three percent in the preceding financial year;
requirements.object: percent and net NPAs shall be less than three percent in the preceding financial year
any monetary penalty by the RBI during the last two financial years and during the year of submitting application

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) There shall not be any default in the maintenance of CRR / SLR during
the preceding financial year;
requirements.object: the maintenance of CRR / SLR during the preceding financial year

requirements.full_sentence:
and
(7) A UCB shall be a member of authorized card network, such as RuPay,
Visa, or MasterCard, etc.
requirements.object: authorized card network, such as RuPay, Visa, or MasterCard, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall comply with instructions and guidelines on Merchant Acquisition for
card transactions and POS issued by Department of Payment and Settlement
Systems, RBI from time to time.
requirements.object: guidelines on Merchant Acquisition for card transactions and POS issued by Department of Payment and Settlement Systems,

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB desirous to deploy their own POS terminals and act as POS acquiring
bank shall apply through PRAVAAH Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to
Department of Regulation, RBI for necessary permission, with the requisite
information and documents.
requirements.object: (https://pravaah

requirements.full_sentence:
A licensed UCB desirous of issuing Prepaid Payment Instruments (PPIs) shall
have its own ATM network and there should be no restrictions on acceptance or
repayment of deposits.
requirements.object: network and there should be no restrictions on acceptance or repayment of deposits

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, issuance of Prepaid Payment Instruments shall
be subject to compliance with eligibility criteria and other guidelines as
prescribed by Department of Payment and Settlement Systems (DPSS), RBI
from time to time.
requirements.object: with eligibility criteria and other guidelines as prescribed by Department of Payment and Settlement Systems (DPSS), RBI from

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB satisfying the criteria specified in paragraph 41 shall be permitted to issue
PPIs, subject to compliance with the following regulatory requirements for this
purpose:
(1) A UCB shall be CBS compliant;
requirements.object: PPIs

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The CRAR shall not be less than 10 percent in the current and preceding
financial year;
requirements.object: percent in the current and preceding financial year

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Gross NPAs shall be less than seven percent and net NPAs shall not be
more than three percent in the current and preceding financial year;
requirements.object: percent in the current and preceding financial year

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Assessed net-worth shall be more than ₹25 crore as per the last RBI
inspection;
requirements.object: crore as per the last RBI inspection

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) There shall be no default in the maintenance of CRR/SLR during the
current and preceding financial year;
requirements.object: the maintenance of CRR/SLR during the current and preceding financial year

requirements.full_sentence: (6) A UCB should have made a net profit in the preceding financial year;
requirements.object: profit in the preceding financial year

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) The Board of the UCB shall include at least two professional directors
and shall have the following systems and control in place:
requirements.object: professional directors and shall have the following systems and control in place:

requirements.full_sentence:
(9) A UCB shall not have been subjected to any monetary penalty by the
RBI during the last two financial years and in the year of the application;
requirements.object: any monetary penalty by the RBI during the last two financial years and in the year of the application

requirements.full_sentence:
and
(10) A UCB shall have satisfactorily implemented a comprehensive Board
approved policy on Customer grievance redressal mechanism which
includes escalation matrix for resolution of customer complaints.
requirements.object: comprehensive Board approved policy on Customer grievance redressal mechanism which includes escalation matrix for r

requirements.full_sentence:
The issuance and operation of prepaid instruments shall also be guided by the
instructions issued in this regard by DPSS, RBI from time to time.
requirements.object: the instructions issued in this regard by DPSS, RBI from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
The
directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
